scripts.build: npm run build:all && npm run test:ux:run && node tools/copy-ux-report.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:build && npm run test:e2e:run && npm run test:ux:run && npm run test:lighthouse:run
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:build && npm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:visual: npm run test:build && node tools/copy-ux-report.mjs && playwright test --project=visual
scripts.test:ux: npm run test:build && npm run test:ux:run && node tools/copy-ux-report.mjs
scripts.test:lighthouse: npm run test:build && npm run test:lighthouse:run
